text.tspan: BACKPRESSURE: when a downstream component is SLOWER than upstream,
upstream must slow down too u2014 or queues grow without bound u2014 leading to OOM or timeout cascade.

g.text: WITH BACKPRESSURE: signal upstream to slow down

text.tspan: u2022 OR latency for queued events grows past timeouts
u2022 OR upstream timeouts fire u2192 retries u2192 even more load
u2022 OR the queue is so deep that recovery requires draining for hours
RESULT: producer's rate is GOVERNED by consumer's capacity.
Queue depth bounded. Latency bounded. No OOM. No retry storm.
queue full u2192 producer blocks / sheds / slows
